channel.title: GitHub MATLAB Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of MATLAB in GitHub

item.title: TadasBaltrusaitis/OpenFace
item.description: OpenFace – a state-of-the art tool intended for facial landmark detection, head pose estimation, facial action unit recognition, and eye-gaze estimation.

item.title: bangeravivek/B.E.-Proj
item.description: Final year Project: Image Compression using Vector Quantization and Wavelet Transform

item.title: PRML/PRMLT
item.description: Matlab code of machine learning algorithms in book PRML

item.title: HuangCongQing/Algorithms_MathModels
item.description: 【国赛】【美赛】数学建模相关算法 MATLAB实现（2018年初整理）

item.title: WEC-Sim/WEC-Sim
item.description: Wave Energy Converter Simulator (WEC-Sim), an open-source code for simulating wave energy converters.

item.title: Azure/ccodashboard
item.description: Welcome to the Continuous Cloud Optimization Power BI Dashboard GitHub Project. In this repository you will find all the guidance and files needed to deploy the Dashboard in your environment to take benefit of a single pane of glass to get insights about your Azure resources and services.
